creator: Jess Hawkins
source_text:
Packed Pasta Salads episode 6 ✌🏻

RECIPE: Creamy Feta & Chorizo Orzo Salad 😌

📌 Don’t forget to SAVE this for when you need some easy summer lunch ideas 👀

It’s been too long since our last packed pasta salad but we’re back with a banger 😌 all of the delicious freshness of a Greek salad, with smoky chorizo, feta, and a creamy garlicky dressing to add extra protein - it is so good, and will keep for up to 4 days in the fridge 👏🏼 

It’s great with chicken added too 👀 and if you just comment ‘FREE’ below, I’ll DM you the link to try 500+ easy recipes like this one, plus weekly meal plans, to help you hit your goals in the most delicious, stress free way 👀

📍 Serves 4 
📍 501 Calories & 28.2g of protein 

✨ 250g orzo, dry weight, cooked and cooled
✨ 1 Cucumber, roughly chopped
✨ 300g cherry tomatoes, quartered 
✨ 125g feta cheese, crumbled 
✨ 100g chorizo, diced
✨ 1 Red Onion, diced (then soaked in cold water for 10 mins)

For the dressing: 

✨ 150g 0% fat Greek yoghurt 
✨ 1 tsp each of garlic granules 
✨ 1 tsp dried oregano
✨ 60g light mayo
✨ 1 tsp dried mint 
✨ The juice of 1/2 a lemon
✨ 50ml semi skimmed milk

Add your chorizo to a cold pan, then turn up the heat, and allow it to cook for around 5 minutes, until crispy and the fat has rendered out.

Meanwhile make your dressing by combining the ingredients listed along with some salt and pepper; give them a really good mix and then taste and adjust. You may need more lemon, and add in a little water if it’s too thick.

Then simply assemble! Add your pasta and salad ingredients to a large serving bowl along with your cooked chorizo, then drizzle over the dressing, mix and serve ❤️

#easyrecipes #lunchrecipes #highprotein #pastasalad #lunchideas
